'''Fibersaws''' were [[Silk/Legends|silk]]-thin cutting tools in use<ref name="TCD" /> by around [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].<ref name="ERC" /> These strands could shear through a [[Droideka/Legends|droideka's]] casing, dissecting the [[Droid/Legends|droid]]. In combat, a [[JK-13 security droid]]'s [[Limb/Legends|tentacular]] extremities could thin to nearly invisible dimensions, operating as fibersaws.<ref name="TCD" />

==Behind the scenes==
Fibersaws were mentioned in the [[2004]] novel ''[[The Cestus Deception]]'', written by [[Steven Barnes]].<ref name="TCD" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The Cestus Deception]]'' {{1stm}}
